name: Signature Design by Ashley Bellaby One Drawer Nightstand White: Bedside Table with USB Port & Storage
description:
Your bedroom isn't just a room, it's a canvas! Express your farmhouse style with this stunning Bellaby nightstand. This nightstand is designed with a wispy white finish over replicated oak wood grain for an authentic touch. This decor accent also features a drawer fitted with a handle in brushed nickel-tone. The drawer is also quite spacious and lined with faux linen laminate to store belongings with care. It's a lovely accent piece that can brighten up your space. All this and more makes the clean-lined profile of the Bellaby nightstand by Signature Design the perfect authentic foundation for an inviting decor.

Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
